info.title: Live Auction Proto HTTP API
info.description: OpenAPI contract synchronized with api/auction/service/v1/*.proto HTTP bindings. Business JSON routes are implemented by Kratos protoc-gen-go-http handlers; upload, websocket, health, metrics, worker and cluster endpoints remain hand-written infrastructure routes.

get.summary: List team users for current main account

post.summary: Create a scoped team user for current main account
Update a scoped team user role
Update a scoped team user status
Reset a scoped team user password

get.summary: Get public lot result with optional private order visibility
List auction orders for backoffice roles
List rooms for current main account
